title: Don't Start ANY Claude Code Project Until You Watch This
summary: Austin Marchese presents three rules for successfully building projects with Claude Code, drawing on his experience scaling startups. The video outlines what to build versus avoid, introduces six practices for AI team leadership, and provides a four-question test to evaluate projects before starting.
